name: Axis Neo Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Annual fee waived on spending ₹50,000 in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 1 EDGE Point per ₹200 spent on all purchases
2X EDGE Points (2 per ₹200) on Flipkart and Myntra purchases
4X EDGE Points (4 per ₹200) on bill payments and mobile recharges

additionalBenefits: 2X rewards on Flipkart and Myntra shopping
4X rewards on bill payments and recharges
Easy annual fee waiver with ₹50,000 spend
pros: Low annual fee of ₹250, easily waived with ₹50K spend
4X rewards on bill payments and recharges is useful for everyday spends
2X rewards on Flipkart and Myntra for online shoppers
Good starter card with no high income requirement
Fuel surcharge waiver saves on petrol pump transactions
cons: Low base earn rate of 1 point per ₹200 (0.2% effective)
EDGE Point value is low at ₹0.40 per point
No milestone or annual spend benefits
idealFor: First-time credit card users looking for a low-fee entry card
Users who frequently pay bills and recharge via the card
Flipkart and Myntra shoppers seeking accelerated rewards

faqs.question: How do I get the annual fee waived on the Axis Neo card?
faqs.answer: Spend ₹50,000 or more in a year and the ₹250 annual fee is waived for the next year.

faqs.question: What is the value of EDGE Points on this card?
faqs.answer: 1 EDGE Point is worth approximately ₹0.40 when redeemed for statement credits or gift vouchers.

faqs.question: Does the Axis Neo card offer lounge access?
faqs.answer: No, the Axis Neo Credit Card does not come with any domestic or international lounge access.

faqs.question: Can I get this card as my first credit card?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Axis Neo is an entry-level card with a minimum income requirement of ₹2.5 lakh per annum, making it accessible for salaried individuals starting out.
